description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic, robust design with a matte gray body and prominent mechanical detailing. The frame is thick and muscular, with large, heavily treaded tires and exposed engine components, giving it a cyberpunk or sci-fi aesthetic. The seat is contoured for a single rider, and the handlebars are wide with visible control clusters. The front and rear lights are compact and integrated into the bodywork, while the exhaust system is bulky and industrial, running along the side. The motorcycle also has a digital display on the dashboard and a visible license plate on the rear. The overall build suggests a high-performance, urban-ready vehicle with a focus on durability and style.
description: A futuristic, matte gray motorcycle with large treaded tires, exposed engine parts, and a robust, cyberpunk-inspired frame. It features a single contoured seat, wide handlebars, and integrated lighting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, thick front tire, compact headlights, and digital dashboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the exposed engine, bulky exhaust, and contoured seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide rear tire, taillights, and visible license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mechanical detailing, exhaust system, and overall frame structure.
